name: xe-bot-mcp
description: MCP Server for Xe-Bot Research Paper Animation Generator
author: Xe-Bot

tools.name: search_arxiv
tools.description: Search arXiv for research papers by query or topic

tools.name: generate_animation
tools.description: Generate an animated video explanation for a research paper from arXiv

tools.name: get_paper_info
tools.description: Get information about a specific arXiv paper

tools.name: get_animation_code
tools.description: Get the Manim code for a specific animation

required.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
required.description: OpenRouter API key for LLM access
